x-enumeration-literals.name: Eligibility Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Criteria that must be met for posting to occur

Comment:
Example
Posting allowed only if account is active, or loan status is current; overdraft limit not exceeded

x-enumeration-literals.name: Timing Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules about when a posting occurs, including business days, cut-off times, or posting schedules

Comment:
Example
Loan repayment posted only on working days; fund transfer scheduled at 2 PM daily cut-off

x-enumeration-literals.name: Allocation Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules about how the posted amount is split across accounts or components

Comment:
Example
Payment allocated first to fees, then interest, then principal; deposit split 60% to savings, 40% to term deposit

x-enumeration-literals.name: Limit Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Minimum or maximum amounts for posting execution

Comment:
Example
Posting only occurs if payment ≥ €10; maximum withdrawal posting capped at €5,000 per day

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conversion Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules about which currency or FX rate to use

Comment:
Example:
Foreign currency deposit posted using prevailing USD/EUR exchange rate; FX gain/loss calculated

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Application Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules about when fees or charges are applied during posting

Comment:
Example:
Late payment fee applied only if repayment is after due date; monthly maintenance fee posted on first business day

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for interest calculation and posting

Comment:
Example:
Interest credited monthly on minimum balance; accrued daily but posted monthly

x-enumeration-literals.name: Approval Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Requirement of prior approval for posting

Comment:
Example:
Large fund transfer postings require manager approval; loan disbursement posting requires credit committee approval

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recurring Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for periodic or recurring postings

Comment:
Example:
Monthly standing instruction for rent, or weekly payroll posting

x-enumeration-literals.name: Event-Based Posting Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Posting triggered by a specific event or condition

Comment:
Example:
Interest posted only if balance exceeds €1,000; loyalty reward credited when transactions > 5 per month

x-enumeration-literals.name: Carry-Over Condition
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules for handling leftover amounts

Comment:
Example:
Partial payment applied to principal first, remainder carried forward to next posting cycle
